message:
test(action): add property tests for recovery tree, session, and executor invariants (process_triage-aii.25)

14 proptest properties (2000 cases each) in new recovery_properties.rs
covering RecoveryTreeDatabase (tree existence/lookup safety),
RequirementContext (full-context satisfaction/all_met consistency/consume),
RecoverySession (attempt count/budget consumption/exhaustion/fresh state),
RecoveryExecutor (find_alternatives/best_matches/classify/hint generation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 03f6e6fb4f7012be86178529dbf59f28cfe43b28255282745dfbd038eb6654f4 # shrinks to action = Renice
